title: Singularity image for single-cell pipeline
author: AGLAVE Marine
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Singularity images for single-cell pipeline from Gustave Roussy : 

 
	 in all images: R 4.1.0 and Seurat v4 
	 single_cell.simg: all package for single-cell individual analysis + cerebro v1.3 
	 single_cell_oldcerebro.simg: cerebro v1.2.2 
	 single_cell_integration.simg: all packages for RNA integration (seurat + scbfa + harmony + liger) 
	 single_cell_TCR_BCR.simg: CellRanger v3.5.1 + scRepertoire R package 
	 single_cell_DE.simg: all packages for differential expression analysis (wilcoxon + limma + edgeR)
steps_raw:
